content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
This teaching allows the student to acquire the necessary skills in scientific English, such as writing a summary note in English and presenting it at the end.
Contenu de la matière
Effective Writing Skills
Understanding and Applying Vocabulary
Remedial English Grammar and Usage
Preparing for a Career
Presentation Skills
Business Communication
Soft Skills for Leadership and Team Management
Mode d’évaluation : examen
